top_signals.title: South African Veterinary Association Stands Against Live Export
top_signals.summary: The South African Veterinary Association’s (SAVA) has released a formal position statement opposing the export of live animals by sea for slaughter at destination.SAVA joins many other international veterinary associations in condemning this practice.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
